design_philosophy: Deliver a distinctive, premium, warm editorial coffee-brand feel. Avoid AI-slop purples and generic tech-SaaS looks. Prioritize sensory textures, generous spacing, and deep contrast using warm cream/mocha palettes.

glassmorphism.usage: Sticky headers, cart drawers, modal overlays

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-heading font-semibold tracking-tight leading-none text-[#2B211E]
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-heading font-medium tracking-tight leading-tight text-[#2B211E]
hierarchy.overline: text-xs font-body uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-medium text-[#D96C4A]

typography.install_instructions: Add Google Fonts imports for Cormorant Garamond and Outfit in index.css or equivalent layout wrapper.

spacing_and_layout.generous_padding: Use p-8, p-12, or py-20 for section spacing. Containers must have breathing room.
spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: Mobile-first. Use 12-column grids (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12) for asymmetrical feature layouts.
spacing_and_layout.cards: Internal padding of p-6 or p-8 to prevent text collision with borders.

buttons.primary: bg-[#D96C4A] text-white font-body font-medium px-6 py-3 rounded-none md:rounded-sm transition-all duration-300 hover:bg-[#C25D3D] hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#D96C4A]/50 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-offset-[#F9F6F0]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#3F322D] text-[#3F322D] font-body font-medium px-6 py-3 rounded-none md:rounded-sm transition-all duration-300 hover:bg-[#3F322D] hover:text-white

cards.menu_item: bg-[#FCFAF8] rounded-xl overflow-hidden border border-[#E3DCCC] shadow-sm transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-xl hover:shadow-[#2B211E]/5
cards.testimonial: bg-white rounded-2xl p-8 shadow-[0_4px_24px_rgba(43,33,30,0.04)] border border-[#E3DCCC]/50

inputs.form: bg-white border border-[#E3DCCC] rounded-sm px-4 py-3 text-[#2B211E] font-body focus:outline-none focus:border-[#D96C4A] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#D96C4A] transition-colors

components.shadcn_overrides: Do not use standard Vercel-look borders. Apply nested radii and use warm border tokens. Convert dialogs/drawers to use the glassmorphism spec.

home: Hero: Large warm cafe interior background, dark glassmorphism overlay or text-shadow for readability, H1 heading, Primary CTA.
Featured Products: 3-column grid of top-tier coffee items.
Testimonials: Grid or elegant swiper with portrait images, 5-star icons (in accent color), and italicized serif quotes.
menu: Category Tabs: Coffee, Beverages, Desserts (Use active state accent line or background).
Menu Grid: Standard 3 or 4-column responsive grid.
Add to Cart: Button visible on hover or persistent below price.
about: Brand Story: Asymmetrical 'Tetris' grid mixing text blocks and cafe interior shots.
Team: High-quality portraits with elegant typography.
contact: Form: Clean inputs on left, Map/Info on right.
Placeholder Map: Aesthetic abstract image or static map placeholder.
Hours & Phone: Prominently displayed with subtle icons.
auth: Login/Register: Split screen. Left side aesthetic coffee image, right side glassmorphism or clean white form.
cart_drawer: Behavior: Slides in from right. Uses local storage sync.
UI: Image, Title, Qty controls (-, +), Remove (trash icon), Total.
admin_dashboard: Style: Clean, functional, tabular data for menu items (Add/Remove). Avoid over-styling, prioritize clarity.

animations.hover: Smooth transform scale or translate-y, accompanied by subtle box-shadow increase.
animations.transitions: Use 'transition-all duration-300' for most interactable elements.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure white text over accent orange meets 4.5:1, otherwise darken orange or use dark text. (White on #D96C4A may be slightly low contrast, check and use #C25D3D for critical text).
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., 'data-testid="add-to-cart-button"').

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette. Do not inject Tailwind's default blues or purples anywhere.
For the Sticky Nav, implement the glassmorphism spec provided when scrolled.
Use Shadcn components (Dialog, Tabs, Drawer, etc.) but strip their default harsh grayscale borders and replace with our warm border tokens.
Ensure the hero image has a sufficient dark gradient overlay so the heading text is perfectly readable.
Cart drawer MUST sync with localStorage.
All forms MUST have validation logic (frontend).
Apply optical alignment in navigation and cards.
Do not use placeholder image services like via.placeholder.com. Use the provided Unsplash URLs.
